attention4.ptxt: Failure to use correct fasteners or to properly use fasteners can cause parts or system damage.

item.ptxt: When fasteners are removed, always reinstall them at the locations from which they were removed.

All fasteners must be replaced with fasteners having the same part number. If a fastener of the correct part number is not available, a fastener of the same size having equal or higher strength may be used.

This manual identifies and indicates special conditions for all non-reusable fasteners and fasteners requiring the use of thread-locking compound. Be sure to follow all instructions, including torque values.
